# On the Will in Nature

*[Schopenhauer](../philosophers/schopenhauer.md) · 1836 · *Über den Willen in der Natur**

A short work in which Schopenhauer seeks, in the empirical sciences of his day, physiology, botany, animal magnetism, confirmation that will is indeed the active ground of all nature, from gravitation to instinct.
